title: eryngium karatavicum
intro: Eryngium karatavicum, also known as Sea Holly, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to Central Asia. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been employed in folk medicine to treat various health issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Eryngium karatavicum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies for its anti-cancer and antimicrobial properties.
